gates.name: Director's Treatment
checks: visual world and production design system defined
every shot has a visual job and justification
cut points, transitions, music hits, and final hold are planned
Seedance 2 multi-shot node grouping is defined
complex motion shots are flagged for GPT Image 2 director's-notes boards

gates.name: Aesthetic Preflight
checks: shot ladder is not repeated same subject/location/pose grammar

gates.name: Motion Launch
checks: required GPT Image 2 director's-notes boards exist and passed readability review
reference-dependent nodes have visible source connections

gates.name: Selects Review
checks: strongest clips selected by editorial job

gates.name: Delivery
checks: export contains audio when music was planned
every planned generated motion segment is exported locally and verified with ffprobe
reviewed motion coverage is at least 80 percent unless the user requested a slideshow
still/proxy coverage is no more than 10 percent unless explicitly labeled partial/proxy
shot-source manifest proves every visual shot is reviewed Imagine.Art motion, supplied motion, or deterministic type/layout
no final visual shot is a still crop, mood-board panel, brand-board crop, workflow screenshot, slideshow, or local pan/zoom move
